notes: Fixed 3 test failures (Foundry model mapping, DB tests without Postgres, scope middleware bug). Added 6 new test files and expanded 3 existing ones to boost coverage from 76.43% to 85.20%. CI now passes fully (lint + typecheck + coverage). Key bug: auth middleware parseJwtPayload was not extracting scope from PAT payload, bypassing all scope restrictions.

Completed all 5 phases of llm-gateway-10x plan. Phases 1-3 were previously done; finished Phase 4 (Observe: trace sampling, span wiring, x-ms-client-request-id propagation, DEBUG body logging) and Phase 5 (Operate: configurable health checks, scheduler race fix, OpenAPI spec, runbook). Final state: 435 pass, 7 skip, 0 fail, 85.01% coverage, CI green.
